items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 12:1
items.html: The measure of the level of Malchut is called HaVaYaH in filling of Heys. (Item 56, and Inner Light, Sub Header, “In Yods”)
